title: fumaria parviflora subsp. schleicheri
intro: Fumaria parviflora subsp. schleicheri, also known as Small-flowered Fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the fumitory family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fumaria parviflora subsp. schleicheri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
